title: EnrichPhaseEvent
description: Phase event emitted by `sqlite-graphrag enrich` on stdout (NDJSON). Two events per run: 'validate' (checks LLM provider binary) and 'scan' (discovers items to enrich). Fields beyond 'phase' are present only when relevant to the phase.

phase.description: Phase name: validate (checks LLM provider) or scan (counts pending items).

binary_path.description: Filesystem path of the detected LLM provider binary. Present in validate phase.

version.description: Detected LLM provider version string. Present in validate phase for Claude Code; null for Codex.

items_total.description: Total items found by the scan. Present in scan phase.

items_pending.description: Items still pending processing. Present in scan phase.
